Documentation.long_help: For each point, finds the minimum distance to surface cells whose normals oppose the point normal (dot product ≤ Opposite Normal Dot Max, default 0). Writes a point scalar array. Optionally moves points along +point normal when thickness is below a positive threshold (Thickness Threshold), by (threshold − thickness), capped by Max Displacement if set.
Documentation.short_help: Minimum distance to opposite-facing cells; optional normal-direction thickening below a threshold.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: OppositeNormalDotMax
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Opposite Normal Dot Max
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: A cell counts as opposite-facing when N_point·N_cell ≤ this value (default 0: non-acute relative to the point normal). More negative values require clearer opposition.

StringVectorProperty.name: ThicknessArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Thickness Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the output point scalar array storing minimum distance.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseInputNormalArray
IntVectorProperty.label: Use Input Normal Array
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When off (default), point normals are computed with vtkPolyDataNormals. When on, use the selected 3-component point vector array on the input.

StringVectorProperty.name: PointNormalArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Point Normal Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: 3-component point vectors used when Use Input Normal Array is on.

IntVectorProperty.name: EnableThicknessRepair
IntVectorProperty.label: Enable Thickness Repair
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on (default), points with finite thickness below Thickness Threshold move along +point normal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ThicknessThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Thickness Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Repair runs only for positive finite thresholds; displacement is (threshold − thickness) along the normal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxDisplacement
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max Displacement
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: When > 0, caps per-point repair motion along the normal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: InvalidThicknessValue
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Invalid Thickness Value
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Scalar written when no opposite-facing cell is found.
